prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: 洁净车间内部. 运行设备, 黄色警示线, 压力管路, 仪表盘, 洁净通道, 禁止拍摄标识, 禁止触摸标识. lighting: 明亮白光，工业照明，无影. 手机拍摄禁止图标显示在画面中央, 人员站在指定区域听讲解. Narration: "车间内涉及工艺、设备和产品信息。未经许可，不得拍照、录像或直播。如需交流问题，请在指定区域进行，不要影响现场人员操作。". Camera motion: medium shot, subtle hand-held camera feel, focus on subject action. 手机拍摄禁止图标，红色圆圈斜杠，清晰醒目，人员站在黄色指定区域线内，背景为洁净车间，讲解员手势引导，柔和照明，工业风格. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.
negative: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), 杂乱线缆, 溢出液体, 敞开门, 无标识区域, 模糊，杂乱，阴影过重, multiple characters, duplicate person, clone, inconsistent lighting, wrong angle, lens distortion, chromatic aberration, face morphing, character drift, outfit change, prop mutation, scene layout shift, extra fingers, distorted limbs, text artifacts, burnt-in subtitles, logo, watermark, motion blur excessive, flickering, framing jump cut
motion: medium shot, subtle hand-held camera feel, focus on subject action
tool_hint: Copy "prompt" and "negative" into video generation tool. Upload "condition_images" for img2vid start/end frame conditioning if supported. "context_ref_images" are previous shot keyframes for visual continuity. Duration is a guideline.
